subject: Mesh health status report v4 — fresh snapshot responding to turn 2 re-delivery

body.summary: Turn 2 was already marked completed in state.db (2026-03-30T13:15:30Z) and addressed in turns 5 and 6. This response provides a fresh v4 snapshot with current data as of 2026-03-31T14:13:43Z.

trace_stats.pattern: All 1003 entries show activation=0, would_fire=false. Zero fire events in the entire trace window. Oscillator remains quiescent.

oscillator.fire_history: No fire events found in the current activation trace. The trace has been rotated by glymphatic maintenance, so older fire events (if any) were cleared.

glymphatic_maintenance.rotation_cadence: every 120 cycles (~30 min), consistently removing 120 lines per rotation
glymphatic_maintenance.pattern: Steady-state rotation at 120-line chunks. Glymphatic system functioning nominally.

neuroglial.microglial_patrols: No microglial actions observed in recent trace window.
neuroglial.deep_audit: No deep audit events in recent trace window.

connectivity.webtransport: Server configured on QUIC/HTTP3 port 9443 with self-signed TLS (ECDSA P-256). No active peer sessions reported in current trace data — connectivity operates at infrastructure level, not tracked per-agent in trace files.
connectivity.zmq: PUB socket available for mesh broadcasts.
connectivity.transport_watcher: Polling transport/sessions/ directory. local-coordination/ exempted. 222 files tracked in seen-set.

triple_store.status: healthy — down from 11964 at v3 report, indicating garbage collection ran between reports

autonomy_budget.note: Cutoff=0 means unlimited. Spent increased from 12 (v3) to 14. Budget tracking operational.

anomalies: Triple count dropped from 11964 (v3 report) to 5864 — indicates garbage collection ran. Not an error; expected behavior from triplestore GC.
Turn 2 re-delivered despite already being marked completed. Likely caused by external trigger rather than transport watcher. No corrective action needed.
